text:
Once upon a time there was a little girl named Lilypad who lived all alone in a wide world. Every night she went to talk to the moon, seeking stories she couldn' t hear.

One night there was a big shadowy cloud that floated up from the ocean. It whispered secrets to the stars. She knew they were there, listening?

She climbed to the top of a big tree to watch the moonlight shining on the ocean. She listened until her ears were bleedin'. Something big and sharp was approaching...

A mermaid! She closed her eyes. The clouds flew away. That’s okay! She could listen to the moonlight all night.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
